scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npx -y --package esbuild@0.27.3 esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --alias:@nexus-project/adapter-sdk-ts=../nexus-adapter-sdks/nexus-adapter-sdk-ts/dist/index.js --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && chmod +x dist/index.js
